name_en: 【Factory Leather】 🔥🔥🔥 Model: 795199 Dimensions: 25.5/15.5/6.5 The GG Marmont series interprets the classic quilted V-shaped leather with new silhouettes and sizes, showcasing early autumn charm. This small handbag is crafted in light gray, with gold-tone hardware and a fashionable silhouette.
